name: Grade 1 Mindful Movement — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: CASEL supporting practices
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Mindful Movement pathway.

units.title: Investigate: body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to body signals, breathing, balance, focus, and respectful space.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
